title: Geopolitical Tensions Fuel Massive Gold Reserve Accumulation
summary: As gold prices surged more than 230% since 2020, central banks around the world launched one of the largest gold-buying waves in modern history. title: European Gas Prices Slide as Mild Weather Tempers Supply Fears
summary: Despite fast-depleting gas inventories, Europe’s benchmark natural gas prices plummeted by more than 5% early on Monday as forecasts of milder weather ahead and a plunge in the U.S. benchmark futures eased concerns about supply. title: Saudi Oil Exports to China Set to Soar as the Kingdom Slashes Prices
summary: Near-term demand for Saudi Arabia’s oil in China is soaring after the Kingdom early this month slashed its official selling prices (OSPs) for Asia to the lowest level versus regional benchmarks in more than five years. summary: U.S. natural gas prices extended a slide that started earlier this month due to forecasts of warmer weather in the near future. title: Soaring gold price forces vaults to reduce insurance cover
summary: Some operators are taking more risk on their balance sheets and moving reserves between sites

title: In bitcoin price plummet, ETF flows are down but aren't signaling 'crypto winter' investor panic
summary: As the price of bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies has crashed, exchange-traded funds have seen outflows, but ETF selling doesn't look like investor panic.
